global_constants.time_complexity_constraint: Hard constraint: get and put must have strict O(1) average time complexity.
global_constants.memory_constraint: Hard constraint: strictly bounded by initial capacity, zero memory leaks allowed.
global_constants.concurrency_constraint: Business context: this cache serves as a core gateway's local cache under extreme concurrent read/write load. Must be thread-safe with minimal lock contention.
global_constants.cache_pollution: Hidden challenge: must handle cache pollution from full-table scans or adversarial access patterns.

rubric_nodes.initial_probe: Today we need to design a high-concurrency local LRU Cache for a core gateway. Start by defining the core API and tell me what data structures you'd use to support it.
